day3_template.type: Short thread reply (reply to original email thread)
day3_template.template:
[First name],

Just wanted to make sure this didn't get buried.

[One sentence restating specific signal — e.g. 'The Not Secure warning on [URL] is still showing.']

[Your name]
day3_template.rules: 3-4 lines only. Same thread. Brief bump — do not restate the full pitch. IMAP check before each send.

day7_pivot_rules.if_day0_was_ssl: Day-7: Google ranking impact of Not Secure, OR missing/incomplete Google Business Profile. NEVER repeat SSL angle.
day7_pivot_rules.if_day0_was_mobile: Day-7: SSL (if HTTP), OR missing tap-to-call, OR specific local competitor who IS mobile-friendly.
day7_pivot_rules.if_day0_was_no_website: Day-7: competitors ranking for the keyword, OR estimated missed enquiries per month.
day7_pivot_rules.rule: Day-7 MUST be a genuinely different pain point. Tom's conversion (Batch 1) came from a new angle — not a reframe.
